_comment: Efficio HQ — internal agent fleet status. This is the SAMPLE/seed feed. The dashboard (hq.html) fetches this file on load and re-polls it every poll_interval_seconds. To go live, replace this static file with a real endpoint that each Hermes agent on the VPS writes to (see HQ_MAKE_IT_LIVE.md). Keep the same shape. 'verification' MUST be honest: 'verified-live' only when the value is confirmed by a real signal; otherwise 'awaiting-feed'.

fleet.note: No live heartbeat endpoint wired yet. Statuses below are from this session's audits, not a real-time feed. 'awaiting-feed' agents will turn green automatically once the VPS starts writing this file.
